title: Social Science Research Assistants
description: Assist social scientists in laboratory, survey, and other social science research. May help prepare findings for publication and assist in laboratory analysis, quality control, or data management.

tasks.text: Design and create special programs for tasks such as statistical analysis and data entry and cleaning.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide assistance with the preparation of project-related reports, manuscripts, and presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare tables, graphs, fact sheets, and written reports summarizing research results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform descriptive and multivariate statistical analyses of data, using computer software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify the accuracy and validity of data entered in databases, correcting any errors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and implement research quality control procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, manipulate, and manage extensive databases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform data entry and other clerical work as required for project completion.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Conduct internet-based and library research.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Present research findings to groups of people.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain informed consent of research subjects or their guardians.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer standardized tests to research subjects, or interview them to collect research data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recruit and schedule research participants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Screen potential subjects to determine their suitability as study participants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Track research participants, and perform any necessary follow-up tasks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Edit and submit protocols and other required research documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Code data in preparation for computer entry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Track laboratory supplies and expenses such as participant reimbursement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in the design of survey instruments such as questionnaires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise the work of survey interviewers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform needs assessments or consult with clients to determine the types of research and information required.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Allocate and manage laboratory space and resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
